commands.review_summary:
The PR wires lifecycle status reactions into WhatsApp, adds deploy/build/concierge status-reaction categories and config keys, updates Telegram variants/default emoji, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source inspection: the shared controller cleanup, WhatsApp empty-reaction removal contract, and existing audio-preflight ack test expose the regressions. I did not run a live WhatsApp or Telegram session in this read-only review.
